TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_api

S.FORM: yau stangi ya yau u ya lazat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 剛才有人。
There is a person.

S.FORM: matiw mkyala matiw ta nipadumaanna tu byabas.
S.TRANSL: (他)去摘…去種芭樂的地方。
(He) went to pluck…went to where he planted guavas.

S.FORM: mkyala tu byabas baqian aizipna.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人,他摘芭樂。
The elder, he plucked guavas.

S.FORM: yau tangi yau ti ya sunisna.
S.TRANSL: 等一下他的小孩子有來。
Later, there was his child.

S.FORM: yau ti ya sunisna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的小孩有來。
There was his child.

S.FORM: yau ti pangmuanna sunisna sepez taqeRawasan tu byabas nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的小孩子有幫忙把芭樂放到籃子裡。
His child helped put the guavas into the basket.

S.FORM: puniR ti ya qeRawasna ya qibina nani.
S.TRANSL: 籃子滿了。
The basket was full.

S.FORM: qu puniR ti ya qeRawasta.
S.TRANSL: 我們的籃子滿了很好。
It’s good that our basket was full.

S.FORM: yau situngawakita zinna saiza.
S.TRANSL: 他們可能想說我們要把芭樂送去。
‘Let’s send (the guavas to somewhere),’ said they perhaps.

S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個老人。
That’s the male elder.

S.FORM: wiya ti mzaqis mzaqis pa ita tababaw si.
S.TRANSL: 我們要到上面去。
We’re going to climb to the top.

S.FORM: tuRang pa ita uman.
S.TRANSL: 我們要再(把籃子)裝滿。
We’re going to fill (the basket) again.

S.FORM: sapuniRanta taq taqeRawas a zau zinna saiza nani.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想說我們要把籃子裝滿。
‘We’re going to fill the basket,’ he thought perhaps.

S.FORM: wiya ti tim e mzaqis nani.
S.TRANSL: (他)上去。
(He) climbed up.

S.FORM: wani sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個小孩。
That’s the child.

S.FORM: tmungaw ti tungawakita qenyaalata zinna.
S.TRANSL: 他說,我們要把我們所拿的送去。
‘Let’s send what we took (to somewhere),’ said he.

S.FORM: mzaqis tu pizianna ta taizaan u taqitunan.
S.TRANSL: 他(把籃子)放到車子上面。
He put (the baskets) onto something ... onto the bicycle.

S.FORM: tmungaw tmungaw naquni smani nipasaqayna nani suRaw ti ya sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 他去送(芭樂),不知怎麼地,那個小孩騎車的時候跌倒了。
He sent (the guavas to somewhere), but somehow the child fell down while riding.

S.FORM: pyaqudu ti ya byabas a yau mniz nani.
S.TRANSL: 全部的芭樂都散落一地。
All the guavas were scattered all over.

S.FORM: yau ti ya sunis a yau mespes ta nunuqna ta.
S.TRANSL: 小孩按摩自己的小腿骨頭處。
The child stroked the bone of his shank.

S.FORM: nayau saiza tiquqanna na ‘nay qitunna muni smani.
S.TRANSL: 不知道被什麼打到。
I don’t know what hit him.

S.FORM: nani yau ti ya ‘daq ‘daqna.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友來了。
There came his friends.

S.FORM: pangmuanna ti na ‘daqna smapun pizi ta qeRawasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友幫忙撿,放到籃子裡。
His friends helped pick up (the guavas) and put (them) into the basket.

S.FORM: sepezanna ti uman ta izaan u ta qitunanna tazitinsiyaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們又把籃子放到那個 ... 放到車子上,到腳踏車上。
They put (the basket) onto something ... onto his vehicle, onto his bicycle again.

S.FORM: pun nani wiya ti tungawanna.
S.TRANSL: 好了就去送(芭樂)。
Later (when it was finished), he sent (the guavas to somewhere).

S.FORM: timu smaqay ya sunis a yau tmibuq ti ya qubuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果小孩走掉後,他的帽子掉了下來。
It turned out that when the child went away, his hat fell down.

S.FORM: azkaw tmibuq ti ya qubuta nani wiya ti sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 唉呦, 我們的帽子掉下去了。小孩子走掉了。
Alas, our hat fell down. The child left.

S.FORM: wani kaputna nani qu alaakita qubuna tmibuq alaanna ti na su na ‘daqna ya qubu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們去拿他的帽子。他的朋友去拿他的帽子。
Let’s take his hat. His fiends took the hat.

S.FORM: syazi ta tasnaqayna nani.
S.TRANSL: 走到半路。
On his way

S.FORM: niwusanna ti na sunis a yau na paqitun tu byabas nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們叫那個騎單車載芭樂的人。
They whistled the child who rode the bike with guavas.

S.FORM: yau ti ya sunis a yau tmungaw tu qubuna na.
S.TRANSL: 他們送來他的帽子。
They returned his hat.

S.FORM: pwasaanna tu uzusa tu byabas zinna.
S.TRANSL: 他回送兩個芭樂。
He gave them two guavas in return.

S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani pun nani tmadikud ti ya sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子回頭。
The child turned.

S.FORM: mai iku tmayta tmadikud.
S.TRANSL: (老人說), 我沒看到他回頭。
‘I didn’t see him turn round,’ (said the elder).

S.FORM: pun nani yau ti ya baqian yau smaRuR.
S.TRANSL: 老人家下來。
The elder went down.

S.FORM: tmayta tu peniqeRawasna.
S.TRANSL: (老人家)看著他的籃子。
(The elder) looked at his baskets.

S.FORM: saqeRawas ti ma nani yau ngatu.
S.TRANSL: 只剩一個滿滿的籃子還有一個裝一半的(籃子)。
Only a full basket and a half.

S.FORM: zazaka.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣。
That’s all.
